declaredLane: document owner lifecycle and progress residual owner cleanup
observedMutationClass: docs index registry update and active residual owner reroute from progress to playtest checklists
acceptanceEvidenceClass: stale owner text scan, docs health, and full rules lint; no gameplay, WebGL browser, or Unity runtime acceptance evidence
rootCause: The progress document was still named as the active residual owner for GameScene multiplayer and WebGL Account/Garage product smoke while the concrete execution details lived in playtest checklists, so the registry and owner documents could drift from the actual closeout owner.
prevention: Reroute active residual owner fields to the runtime validation checklist and WebGL smoke checklist, keep progress focused on current verdict and next blocker, and preserve the existing recurrence hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: rg -n "residual: `plans\\.progress`|active closeout owner: `plans\\.progress`|plans\\.progress WebGL account residual" docs returned no stale active-owner tokens; npm run --silent docs:health -- --json; npm run --silent rules:lint
